First Bot on this account, why GF? I don't fucking know, easiest one to fix up for the public, even added music! Don't know why it's limited to a tag but whatevah, that's all I gotta say, enjoy or something, GYAH FIRE EMOJI! 🔥🔥🔥

Short kings eat good tonight... Also was slightly inspired by Funkadelix, that shit rocks brah.

Tried making it as AnyPov as I could, if it still fucks up uhhh tell me and I'll try to fix it

Updated everything as of December 23rd, just making it look better, also making it Christmas because my original bot is taking a bit too long (I'm PROCRASTINATING but I swear I'll get it out)

Ill remove the holidays 2025 tag for this bot after December
